text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, that was quite the eventful summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Plan A is in motion... All that's left is to prepare
for the Kikuka Sho. If I do say so myself, my time
management skills are extraordinary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's almost an entirely different person from how
she was before summer camp. While I'm happy for
her newfound enthusiasm, I can't help but worry..
choice_data_list: (What is this Plan A she keeps talking about?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey, guinea pig! Let's give the Classics our all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer quickly comes to an end, leaving my
unanswered questions... unanswered. With our
sights on the Kikuka Sho, days of back-to-back
training begin in full swing.
